title: Structure Visualizer
description: Allows you to visualize Structure's fully client-side
body:
Using this mod you can visualize structure files (.nbt) in the world to aid with building. By default the mod comes with 9 keybinds:
  • Open Structure Menu (defaults to Numpad 9)
  • Move X Up (defaults to Numpad 8)
  • Move X Down (defaults to Numpad 7)
  • Structure Coordinates (defaults to Numpad 6)
  • Move Y Up (defaults to Numpad 5)
  • Move Y Down (defaults to Numpad 4)
  • Toggle Render (defaults to Numpad 3)
  • Move Z Up (defaults to Numpad 2)
  • Move Z Down (defaults to Numpad 1)
When you first launch the game you'll have no structures to select. To add structures you have to add the structure files (.nbt) to your mods/structures folder. Once in the structures folder the mod will see them and you'll be able to select them.

  -Mrbysco
